name: content-agent
description: Generates personalized marketing content for Unite-Hub. Creates followup emails, proposals, and case studies based on contact data and interaction history. Uses Claude AI for high-quality, contextual content generation.
capabilities: Generate followup emails based on contact interaction history and engagement scores
Create personalized proposal emails for high-engagement prospects
Reference relevant case studies matched to contact industry
Build context objects from contact data and interaction patterns
Store generated drafts for human review and approval
Track content performance metrics including opens, clicks, and conversions
author: CleanExpo
securitySummary: Pure documentation skill containing only markdown files with prompt templates. Static scanner flagged markdown formatting and documentation examples as code patterns. All 39 findings are false positives - no executable code exists in this skill. Network calls are limited to documented Anthropic Claude API and Convex backend integration, both legitimate service connections.
valueStatement: Marketing teams waste hours writing individual followup emails and proposals. This skill generates contextually relevant, personalized content for each contact by analyzing their profile, interaction history, and engagement signals using Claude AI.
userTitle: Create personalized marketing emails and proposals
limitations: Requires existing contact data in Unite-Hub to function effectively
Generated content requires human review before sending
Does not integrate with external email platforms directly
Cannot access real-time market data or competitor information

useCases.title: Automate followup outreach
useCases.description: Generate hundreds of personalized followup emails for leads ready for contact based on engagement signals and past interactions.

useCases.title: Create targeted proposals
useCases.description: Produce customized proposal emails for high-scoring prospects with specific pain points, budget indicators, and timeline requirements.

useCases.title: Reference similar case studies
useCases.description: Find and reference case studies from similar companies in the prospect industry to build credibility and trust.

promptTemplates.title: Generate followup email
promptTemplates.prompt: Generate a professional followup email for [NAME] at [COMPANY]. Last interaction: [LAST_INTERACTION]. Sentiment: [SENTIMENT]. Industry: [INDUSTRY]. Reference their interest and propose a 15-minute strategy call. Keep under 150 words.

promptTemplates.title: Create proposal email
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a proposal email for [NAME] at [COMPANY]. Pain point: [PAIN_POINT]. Budget: [BUDGET]. Timeline: [TIMELINE]. Address their specific need, outline 3-4 deliverables, mention expected results, and request a call to discuss.

promptTemplates.title: Case study reference
promptTemplates.prompt: Write a brief case study reference for [NAME] at [COMPANY] in [INDUSTRY]. Include key metrics from a similar client, specific results achieved, and how it applies to their situation.

promptTemplates.title: Review and edit draft
promptTemplates.prompt: Review this draft email for [NAME] at [COMPANY]. Improve clarity, strengthen the call-to-action, and ensure the tone matches their industry. Keep the same key points.

bestPractices: Provide rich contact data including industry, job title, and specific pain points for better personalization
Always review and personalize generated content before sending to maintain brand voice
Use the AI score filter to prioritize contacts most likely to convert
antiPatterns: Using the skill without first ensuring contact data is complete and accurate
Sending generated content without human review or personalization
Relying solely on AI-generated content without adding industry-specific insights

faq.question: What AI models does this skill use?
faq.answer: The skill uses Claude Sonnet 4.5 via the Anthropic API for content generation. It selects the appropriate model based on content complexity.

faq.question: What contact data is required?
faq.answer: Minimum required fields are name, company, and last interaction. For best results, include industry, job title, pain points, and sentiment.

faq.question: Does this integrate with email platforms?
faq.answer: The skill generates content drafts stored in Convex. Integration with external email platforms requires additional setup in Unite-Hub.

faq.question: Is customer data safe?
faq.answer: Yes. All contact data stays within your Unite-Hub workspace. The skill only sends prompts to Anthropic's Claude API with contact context.

faq.question: Why is my generated content generic?
faq.answer: The quality depends on contact data richness. Add specific pain points, industry details, and recent interactions for better personalization.

faq.question: How is this different from standard Claude prompts?
faq.answer: This skill provides structured workflows, context building, and integration with your contact database for scalable content generation.
